title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Output Status Rail Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scroll burden by wrapping only the existing conditional /pm-review/import-intake output status rail in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving absent-before-status behavior, Review/Executor/Field Prep status labels, message text, ordering, counts, export behavior, storage boundary, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing conditional PM intake output status rail wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the current behavior where the output status rail is absent before any output status exists.
Preserve Review, Executor, and Field Prep output status labels, message text, ordering, counts, and export behavior.
Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, output actions, quick-jump rail, helper disclosures, and detail disclosures.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state after a status exists, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible status groups, absence of output-status disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 087 recommended PM Lane 088 as Local PM Intake Output Status Rail Disclosure Controls after the quick-jump disclosure pattern landed. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 089 scout and recommended Local PM Intake Route Link Rail Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page output status rail wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open output status disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No output action button label change.
No output status message text change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "selected recipient|handoff created|assigned|scheduled|ready for execution|ready for field|field ready|field log of record|hosted parity proven|approval ready|packet admitted|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
